title: LegendControl-Defender [Pixelmon]
description: Addon changes spawn system for legendary pokemon.
body: [![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a071a84cf75714bde606769f94930a500df439c.png)](https://bisquit.host/en) ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6796f635427d805892e795802d37a6d6c836f982_0.webp) ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/67b836ff6a4bc450de7c2e9e97f4a4b2923203e9.png) * This mod is a module for LegendControl, but the mod itself can work separately. * This module is necessary to protect legendary pokemon from being stolen by other players, a system of trust between players is provided here. * Ability to connect discord webhook for notifications. * Full customization of the mod. ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d70e2cc512728b8549087c31904cd8762598b46.png) * Legendary pokemon will be completely protected from all players when it appears, and the one who caused it to appear will remove the protection some time after it appears. * The player can add other players to their trust list for general catching. * Various notifications when protection expires. ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/482efee63d63b446e8828876572322cce2f8a42a.png) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/pixelmon)[](https://modrinth.com/mod/extralib)
